name: hybrid-poc
description: Hybrid Mobile App POC – Cordova + Vue 3 + Quasar
author: Hritish <hritishx@gmail.com>

scripts.build:android: npm run build && cd cordova && cordova build android
scripts.build:ios: npm run build && cd cordova && cordova build ios
scripts.run:android: npm run build && cd cordova && cordova run android
scripts.run:ios: npm run build && cd cordova && cordova run ios
scripts.emulate:android: npm run build && cd cordova && cordova emulate android
